code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  mut has_pos = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut neg = false
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut digits = 0
      while i < n
        let c = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
          digits = digits + 1
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
        end
        if i == n
          i = n
        end
      end
      i = i
      if digits > 0
        let signed = if neg
          0 - val
        else
          val
        end
        if signed > 0
          if not has_pos
            max_val = signed
            has_pos = true
          else if signed > max_val
            max_val = signed
          end
        end
      end
      # skip to next whitespace
      while i < n
        let c2 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        if c2 == 32 or c2 == 9 or c2 == 13 or c2 == 10
          i = n + 100
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
      if i > n
        i = i - (n + 100) + n
      end
    end
  end
  if has_pos
    println("max=#{max_val}")
  else
    println("none")
  end
end
